message:
fix(matrix,signal): add C3.4 constraints_cbor to unit test token generation

Unit tests were failing because test_token_for_key() (matrix) and
signed_token_for() (signal) built tokens without constraints_cbor,
causing the capability verifier to reject them with CapabilityDenied
before connector logic could run. Added ciborium dev-dependency to both.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,5 +39,6 @@ base64.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 chrono.workspace = true
+ciborium.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
 wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -40,5 +40,6 @@ hex.workspace = true
 percent-encoding.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+ciborium.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
 wiremock.workspace = true
